subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who answered his Lord when the Call was raised from the right side of the Mount through this Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اجاب مولیه اذ ارتفع الندآء من یمین الطور بهذا الظهور
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
